notes: Four modules touched (2 new + 2 edited). Threshold triggers explicit CTO handoff. Stdlib only (threading, os, json, pathlib). No new PyPI dep. Read/write split so a compromised read-only accessor can't accidentally activate. Zero import from agent/live/*, agent/risk/*, agent/squad/* (D065 invariant). `_bump_mtime()` after every write forces immediate read-path cache invalidation on filesystems that don't reflect same-second child changes. `/settings/kill-switches` explicitly added to `_ONBOARDING_HTML_ALLOWED` so the safety UI is reachable even mid-onboarding.
review_criteria: Zero grep hit for `from agent.live` / `from agent.risk` / `from agent.squad` in the two new modules
Golden-path test proves activating global kill masks every symbol
Mobile media query at 700px collapses grid to `1fr`
F013 (future) can compose `is_killed()` into the 4-check pathway without touching this module
